**Locating Specific File Content**

I've shifted focus to recovering the full content of `StudentPortal.jsx`. Realizing the `view_file` call was truncated, I can retrieve the missing lines from the transcript log. Rather than running a command, I'll leverage a node script to search the `transcript.jsonl` log file efficiently and pinpoint the complete file content I need.

args.CommandLine: "node -e \"const fs=require('fs');const lines=fs.readFileSync('C:/Users/yendl/.gemini/antigravity/brain/fa5358e8-9324-4416-978d-4eef2fc3d925/.system_generated/logs/transcript.jsonl','utf8').split('\\n');let found='';for(const line of lines){if(!line)continue;const data=JSON.parse(line);if(data.type==='TOOL_RESPONSE'&&data.content&&data.content.includes('Showing lines 1 to 800')&&data.content.includes('StudentPortal.jsx')){found=data.content;break;}}fs.writeFileSync('C:/Users/yendl/OneDrive/Desktop/librarymanagement/frontend/src/pages/StudentPortal_recovery.txt',found);\""
